query: functional tests are all green, now try to break our /payments API — looking for IDOR, injection, anything
pentest the GraphQL endpoint at api/graphql, we're shipping next week and haven't done any security review
stress test the /orders REST API, it keeps throwing 500s under load and I think there's a concurrency bug
find vulnerabilities in our checkout API before the security audit on Thursday
adversarial test the user auth endpoints — try SQL injection, mass assignment, anything you can think of
written unit tests for the API but haven't checked for IDOR or race conditions yet, can you do that now
our /admin/users endpoint might have broken access control, can you try to exploit it with different user tokens
try to break the rate limiting on POST /api/v2/transfers — I suspect it can be bypassed
we passed all functional tests but QA flagged some weird behavior under parallel requests to /cart/checkout, check for concurrency issues
security audit requires we test for OWASP top 10 on our REST API, help me find injection and auth bypass issues in routes/api.js
write unit tests for the payments API in routes/payments.js
the /orders endpoint is returning 500 errors, help me debug what's causing them
add integration tests for our GraphQL mutations to make sure they return the right data
characterize what the existing /auth endpoints actually do before I refactor them
evaluate whether our test suite has good coverage of the API layer
load test our API with k6 to see how many requests per second we can handle
audit our Claude Code permissions in settings.json for any dangerous bash commands
help me write a changelog for the API v2 release based on recent commits
the API keeps returning 500s under load, use systematic-debugging to trace the root cause in the request pipeline
review test coverage completeness for our API using eval-protocol — want to know what decision points we're missing
